detail: Added pipeline/select_cases.py: stratified post-hoc case selection across (correct_verdict x corruption_tier x domain x ml_task_type). Round-robin within strata, ranks by proxy_mean ascending (harder first). Patched orchestrator.py: mechanism_id now embedded in _pipeline; assemble_batch() joins stage5 smoke files to embed proxy_mean + smoke_scores into assembled cases JSON. Current 100-case batch will not have embedded proxy_mean; selector warns and defaults to equal difficulty.

Overhauled stage3_corruption_node.md to produce harder, less detectable flaws. Root cause: 71% of critique cases had proxy=1.0 (Sonnet caught flaws immediately). Problems: (1) anti-pattern names visible in corrupted text; (2) internal contradictions between sections; (3) retrospective phrasing. Changes: added Detection Bar, strengthened justification requirement, added internal consistency check, added prospective voice requirement, rewrote all taxonomy examples to show embedded (hard) versions, added self-check step.

Added CASE_GENERATION_REPORT.md: full technical methodology report covering two-node pipeline architecture, stage-by-stage design decisions, model selection rationale, post-hoc selection strategy, and 7 documented failures with root causes and fixes (Stage 3 detectability ceiling, OpenRouter model ID format, famous-paper ceiling, pattern-matchable flaw facts, ephemeral artifacts committed to git, smoke scores not embedded in assembled output, non-sequential run dir names).

Fixed two path bugs introduced by run/cases/→run/stage4/ rename: (1) patch_smoke_scores.py still referenced RUN_DIR/'cases' — updated to RUN_DIR/'stage4'; (2) Stage 1 wrote to run/stage1_hypotheses.json (flat file) while Stages 2–5 used subdirectories — moved to run/stage1/hypotheses.json for consistency. Clarified gate/acceptance comments in orchestrator.py: gate is structural validation only, not difficulty filter; difficulty filtering is post-hoc in select_cases.py.

Added pipeline/README.md: documents directory layout, prerequisites, example commands for generating batches (basic, resume, dry-run, model override, no-smoke), post-hoc case selection (by stratum, by total N, merged batches), smoke score backfilling, default model table, and smoke score interpretation guide.

Generated cases_300-499.json (200 cases, --start-case-id 300). Merged all 4 batches (416 cases total, 207 pass --max-proxy 0.83 filter). Selected 96 cases: critique/tier=1: 30, critique/tier=2: 22 (exhausted), critique/tier=3+: 14 (exhausted), defense_wins: 30. tier=2 and tier=3+ are supply-constrained; remaining batches should increase multi-flaw probability.

Write normalize_cases.py to transform ARCH-1 pipeline output schema to experiment schema via field remapping and proxy_mean-derived difficulty labels; experiment scripts (validate_cases.py, self_debate_poc.py) remain stable
Phase 0: setup — normalize_cases.py run, benchmark_cases.json written from pipeline selected_cases_all.json, validate_cases.py passed (110 cases, 80 critique, 30 defense_wins, 42 hard, 68 medium)
normalize_cases.py: ARCH-1 schema mapped to experiment schema; difficulty derived from proxy_mean; must_not_claim IDs assigned; acceptable_resolutions remapped to verdict strings
validate_cases.py passed: 110 cases, 20 with 3+ must_find, 110 with must_not_claim; 0 mixed (expected for ARCH-1)
Phase 0 complete
preflight skill completed — all blockers passed; Phase 0 infrastructure checks are satisfied
Phase 0: setup complete, benchmark_cases copied from pipeline selected_cases_all.json, validate_cases passed
Pipeline-selected cases copied; composition validation passed — 110 cases, 80 critique, 30 defense_wins, 68 medium, 42 hard
Phase 0 complete
Phase 1: CASE_VERIFIER
CASE_VERIFIER complete: 110/110 keep, 0 revise, 0 reject
filter_verified_cases.py passed: 110 keep, 30 defense_wins, 0 mixed — minimums satisfied
Phase 1 complete
EXECUTION_PLAN approved by LEAD, all phase-4-closeable preflight items closed
Phase 4 complete
Phase 5: building scoring engine self_debate_poc.py
self_debate_poc.py confirmed: DC=N/A baseline, ETD=N/A all ARCH-1 cases (critique_wins/defense_wins only), 5 conditions, canonical ETD schema
sensitivity_analysis.py created with PRE-5 two-method comparison: per-case-mean vs per-dimension lift, 0.05 divergence flag
PRE-5 CLOSED: sensitivity_analysis.py includes both per-case-mean and per-dimension lift methods with divergence flag
Phase 5 complete
Phase 5.5: pre-benchmark difficulty gate — 10-case stratified pilot (5 medium, 5 hard) + 10-case hard ceiling check, 3 runs per case per PRE-6
